common.comingSoon: This feature will be available soon.

hero.title: Manage your greenhouse smarter with AI
hero.subtitle: AgroNext is an end-to-end smart agriculture platform built for small and mid-sized greenhouse growers. Track sensor data and get AI-powered recommendations.

features.title: Everything your greenhouse needs
features.subtitle: Sensor tracking, AI analysis, and mobile access in one platform.

ai.title: AI Analysis
ai.description: Your greenhouse data is processed by AI, generating irrigation, fertilization, and climate recommendations automatically.

sensors.title: Sensor Tracking
sensors.description: Monitor temperature, humidity, soil moisture, light, and CO2 in real time.

mobile.title: Mobile App
mobile.description: Access your greenhouse remotely and get instant alerts when thresholds are crossed.

one.title: Install sensors
one.description: Place AgroNext sensors in your greenhouse and connect via Wi-Fi.

two.title: Monitor data
two.description: View all live data and historical trends from your dashboard.

three.title: Apply AI insights
three.description: Increase yield and cut costs with AI-driven recommendations.

testimonials.title: Trusted by growers
testimonials.subtitle: Producers across Turkey transformed their greenhouses with AgroNext.

one.name: Mehmet Kara
one.quote: I cut irrigation by 30% with the same yield. Paid back the investment in 6 months.

two.name: Ayşe Demir
two.quote: I now monitor my greenhouses from my phone. I can check humidity even in the middle of the night.

three.name: Hakan Yılmaz
three.quote: The AI's biopesticide recommendations cut my spraying costs in half.

cta.title: Make your greenhouse smart today
cta.subtitle: Try 14 days free, no credit card required.

pricing.title: Pick the right plan
pricing.subtitle: Start with a small greenhouse and scale all the way to enterprise.

aiHelper.title: Help picking a plan
aiHelper.subtitle: Let the AgroNext assistant suggest the best plan for you.
aiHelper.placeholder: Ask something... (e.g. which plan fits a 500m² greenhouse?)
aiHelper.dormantMessage: This feature will be available soon. You're using a demo version for now.

starter.name: Free
starter.description: For trials or small hobby greenhouses

about.title: Who we are
about.subtitle: We're on a mission to make ag-tech accessible to every grower.

mission.title: Our mission
mission.body: Bring AI and IoT to Turkish growers at an affordable price. Help every greenhouse understand and extract value from its data.

vision.title: Our vision
vision.body: By 2030, lead the digitalization of 50,000 greenhouses across Turkey; make sustainable agriculture within reach.

two.title: Accessibility
two.description: Technology must be accessible to growers of every size.

three.title: Sustainability
three.description: Less water, fewer chemicals, more yield.

blog.title: Blog
blog.subtitle: Smart agriculture, greenhouse management, and news from AgroNext.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Reach out with your questions and we'll get back to you quickly.
